articles.title: Whales Bet Big on Ripple, Accumulate 360 Million XRP
articles.description: Whales appear to leverage the stagnant price action of XRP to secure discounted purchases. The most recent acquisition of over 360 million tokens coincides with amplified censure aimed at the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) by Ripple executives.
